name: Planning Design Doc
purpose: Coordinate specialist agent roles into one plan and evidence document.

roles.label: Architecture
acceptance_criteria: Identifies ownership boundaries and hard-to-reverse technical choices.

roles.label: Auth
acceptance_criteria: Names principals, permissions, trust boundaries, and unresolved identity decisions.

roles.label: Security
acceptance_criteria: Turns security claims into executable gates or explicit human decisions.

roles.label: Data Models
acceptance_criteria: Defines durable state ownership and lifecycle transitions.

roles.label: Data Contracts
acceptance_criteria: Names producer/consumer expectations and compatibility checks.

roles.label: Scaling
acceptance_criteria: Separates current MVP limits from later scale requirements.

roles.label: Runtime Operations
acceptance_criteria: Explains how the system is run, observed, paused, resumed, and recovered.

roles.label: Validation
acceptance_criteria: Maps plan claims to concrete automated or manual validation evidence.

roles.label: Product Semantics
acceptance_criteria: Checks that implementation behavior still matches the intended product outcome.

roles.label: Rollup Editor
acceptance_criteria: Rolls specialist outputs into one coherent plan/evidence document without inventing user intent.
